summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Jared Fixes landing page refinements. All specified UI/UX improvements verified successfully with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: 'Local tech help in Wexford' badge prominently visible in hero section
Navigation CTA uses human-friendly 'Get in Touch' language
Hero CTA button says 'Get in Touch'
Contact form heading says 'Ask a quick question'
Contact form has 'Email or phone' field (not just email)
Contact form contains all required fields: Name, Email/Phone, Message
AI section contains updated copy about 'modern AI tools'
Small Business card uses orange styling (bg-primary/10)
Final CTA section uses warm orange gradient tones (no blue)
All sections render correctly (hero, services, how-it-works, pricing, ai-help, audience, faq, final-cta)
Orange color (#ff6a00) is dominant primary color
No error messages found on the page
Contact modal opens and closes properly
Dark theme with orange accents implemented correctly
